skills.name: find-photographer
skills.description: Find professional photographers in Portugal by location, shoot type, language and budget. Use when a user wants a photoshoot in Lisbon, Algarve, Porto, Madeira or anywhere in Portugal and needs photographer options with packages and EUR prices.

skills.name: quick-booking
skills.description: Book a photoshoot in Portugal without choosing a photographer — Photo Portugal hand-picks a vetted one within 24 hours of payment. Use when the user wants the fastest or cheapest all-inclusive option instead of comparing portfolios.
